mapper.select: /* oms-interfaces-order-sql-oracle selectStockList */ WITH WITH_STOCK AS ( SELECT I.LCKEY AS LOCATION /*로케이션*/ , I.ICKEY AS MATNR /*자재번호*/ , SUBSTR(IV.EXPIREDATE,1,8) AS EXPIRY_DT /* 소비기한(유통기한) */ , IC.ICNM AS MATNR_N /*자재내역*/ , I.LCKEY AS LOCATION_N /*로케이션명*/ , I.CTKEY AS PPART_CD /*내부코드*/ , SUM(COALESCE(I.TTQTY, 0)) AS CURR_ST /*재고*/ , SUM(COALESCE(I.AVQTY, 0)) AS AVAR_ST /*가용수량 20241022 sap요청에 의해 가용+할당+보류*/ , SUM(COALESCE(I.ALQTY, 0)) AS ASSI_ST /*할당수량*/ , SUM(COALESCE(I.HOQTY, 0)) AS BLOCK_ST /*보류수량*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC I JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IV ON I.CTKEY = IV.CTKEY AND I.OWKEY = IV.OWKEY AND I.IVATKEY = IV.IVATKEY AND I.ICKEY = IV.ICKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_LC L ON I.CTKEY = L.CTKEY AND I.LCKEY = L.LCKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON I.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IT ON IT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND IT.ICUNITKEY = IC.ICUTKEY AND IT.ICUNITTYPE = IV.UOM WHERE I.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND I.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND I.TTQTY > 0 GROUP BY I.CTKEY , I.OWKEY , I.ICKEY , IC.ICNM , I.LCKEY , SUBSTR(IV.EXPIREDATE,1,8) , IV.UOM , IT.ICUNITQTY ) SELECT #{baseDt} AS RECDAT /*수신일*/ , #{plantCode} AS WERKS /*플랜트*/ , #{slocationCode} AS LGORT /*저장위치*/ , LOCATION /*로케이션*/ , MATNR /*자재번호*/ , EXPIRY_DT /* 소비기한(유통기한) */ , INVN_ST_CD /* 가용 */ , MATNR_N /*자재내역*/ , LOCATION_N /*로케이션명*/ , PPART_CD /*내부코드*/ , AVAR_ST AS CURR_ST /*재고*/ , AVAR_ST /*가용수량 20241022 sap요청에 의해 가용+할당+보류*/ , 0 AS ASSI_ST /*할당수량*/ , 0 AS BLOCK_ST /*보류수량*/ , #{eaexternuom} AS ISU_QTY /* 재고단위 WMS무조건 EA로 관리 */ FROM ( SELECT LOCATION /*로케이션*/ , MATNR /*자재번호*/ , EXPIRY_DT /* 소비기한(유통기한) */ , '10' AS INVN_ST_CD /* 가용 */ , MATNR_N /*자재내역*/ , LOCATION_N /*로케이션명*/ , PPART_CD /*내부코드*/ , AVAR_ST AS CURR_ST /*재고*/ , AVAR_ST /*가용수량 20241022 sap요청에 의해 가용+할당+보류*/ FROM WITH_STOCK WHERE AVAR_ST > 0 UNION ALL SELECT LOCATION /*로케이션*/ , MATNR /*자재번호*/ , EXPIRY_DT /* 소비기한(유통기한) */ , '20' AS INVN_ST_CD /* 가용 */ , MATNR_N /*자재내역*/ , LOCATION_N /*로케이션명*/ , PPART_CD /*내부코드*/ , ASSI_ST AS CURR_ST /*재고*/ , ASSI_ST AS AVAR_ST /*가용수량 20241022 sap요청에 의해 가용+할당+보류*/ FROM WITH_STOCK WHERE ASSI_ST > 0 UNION ALL SELECT LOCATION /*로케이션*/ , MATNR /*자재번호*/ , EXPIRY_DT /* 소비기한(유통기한) */ , '70' AS INVN_ST_CD /* 가용 */ , MATNR_N /*자재내역*/ , LOCATION_N /*로케이션명*/ , PPART_CD /*내부코드*/ , BLOCK_ST AS CURR_ST /*재고*/ , BLOCK_ST AS AVAR_ST /*가용수량 20241022 sap요청에 의해 가용+할당+보류*/ FROM WITH_STOCK WHERE BLOCK_ST > 0 ) T
mapper.insert: /* oms-interfaces-order-sql-oracle insertTorderIntfWmsRenewal */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INTF_WMS_RENEWAL ( INSERTSYSTM, REQUESTDT, IFID, OWKEY, CTKEY, ISTREGDATE, BFCHGICKEY, AFCHGICKEY, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES ( #{insertsystm}, #{requestdt}, #{ifid}, #{owkey}, #{ctkey}, #{istregdate}, #{bfchgickey}, #{afchgickey}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'api-service', TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'api-service' )

/* oms-interfaces-order-sql-oracle insertTorderIntfWmsB2bOrdOrder */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INTF_WMS_B2BORDORDER ( INSERTSYSTM, CTKEY, OWKEY, SOHDKEY, ICKEY, QTY, TRANID, IFID, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES ( #{insertSystm}, #{ctKey}, #{owKey}, #{soHdKey}, #{icKey}, #{qty}, #{tranId}, #{ifId}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'api-service', TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'api-service' )
mapper.select: /* oms-interfaces-order-sql-oracle getMngCtkey */ SELECT CTKEY FROM TORDER_MST_CT WHERE MANAGEMENTYN ='Y' AND DELYN = 'N'
